barostat_note: B_dyn from NPT volume fluctuations is sensitive to barostat damping (P_DAMP). Nosé-Hoover (LAMMPS fix npt) gives a correct NPT ensemble; verify results are stable across P_DAMP values if reporting to high precision. B_def (P vs ln V slope) is barostat-independent and is provided as a cross-check (Wu, J. Phys. Chem. B 2020, 124, 10811). Agreement within 20% gives confidence in B_dyn.
warning_method_disagreement: B_dyn (3.942 GPa) and B_def (4.732 GPa) disagree by 20.0%. Possible barostat artefact or insufficient equilibration — see Wu 2020.
warning_bdef_unreliable: B_def R²=0.0406 < 0.98 — the P vs ln V relationship is nonlinear, indicating a large pressure derivative B0' (typical for soft melts). The B_def cross-check is unreliable here; B_dyn may also be biased by barostat damping. Use the Murnaghan multi-pressure series (run_bulk_modulus_series) for accurate K on rubbery polymers.
